calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the matter is submitted on the pleadings, that the name of Co-Executor Barbara Bergier was misspelled in the published notice and that no one is here to object. The Court granted the Petition for Ancillary Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $10,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
